name: Plutonian Acquisition Corp. II
business: Plutonian Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company formed in the Cayman Islands for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. It has no current operations and has not identified any specific business combination target.

exposures.sentence: Our efforts to identify a prospective target business will not be limited to a particular industry or geographic location although we intend to focus our search for a target business on companies engaged in energy storage, telecommunications, and consumer sectors.
